title: BankIndex
description: The served puzzle bank index at frontend/public/puzzles/index.json. Bundle-shipped, rewrite-in-place, no migration. Mirrors tools/models.py BankIndex and frontend/src/contracts/bank.ts. sha = canonical-JSON sha256 of the referenced manifest (determinism gate). builtAt is provenance only (excluded from any determinism hash).

evolution.change: Initial BankIndex v1: schemaVersion, generatedSeed (the date write_index ran for), builtAt, puzzles[BankEntry{date,tier,shapeId,file,sha}].
evolution.why: A single served index of the day's puzzles + their content hashes; typed before logic (CLAUDE.md sec 11). The daily bot rewrites it in place with only the run's dates.

evolution.change: BankEntry.shapeId enum tightened to grid-only (seating-row/round-table retired, Row 9d matrix-only contract close). schemaVersion stays 1 - the index shape is unchanged, only the value set narrows.
evolution.why: The served bank is matrix-only after the legacy engine retirement, so a non-grid entry can no longer be produced and the schema forbids it.

evolution.change: The served index now advertises the FULL on-disk archive - every frozen <date>-<tier>.json, oldest-first then tier order - instead of only the daily backfill window (tools/generate.py::index_entries_from_disk). Shape unchanged (more BankEntry items of the identical shape), so schemaVersion stays 1.
evolution.why: A day file is add-only and frozen but used to age out of the index after 7 days, leaving it shipped-but-unreachable in the DayPicker calendar. Indexing every on-disk day keeps the whole past playable; generatedSeed still marks today's default puzzle.
